name: out-loud
description: Free, open-source, 100% offline AI text-to-speech desktop app powered by Kokoro-82M.

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run knip && npm run electron:compile
scripts.electron:dev: npm run electron:compile && concurrently "npm run electron-ui:dev" "wait-on http://localhost:51731 && NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:browser: npm run electron:compile && concurrently "npm run electron-ui:dev" "wait-on http://localhost:51731 && node scripts/serve-electron-ui.mjs"
scripts.electron:build: npm run electron-ui:build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --publish never
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run electron-ui:build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac --publish never -c.directories.output=releases/macos
scripts.electron:build:mas: npm run electron-ui:build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac mas --publish never -c.directories.output=releases/macos
scripts.electron:build:mas-dev: npm run electron-ui:build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac mas-dev --publish never -c.directories.output=releases/macos
scripts.electron:build:win: node scripts/download-vc-redist.mjs && npm run electron-ui:build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --win --publish never -c.directories.output=releases/windows
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run electron-ui:build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --linux --publish never -c.directories.output=releases/linux
scripts.extension:safari:convert: mkdir -p releases/extensions && xcrun safari-web-extension-converter chrome-extension --project-location releases/extensions/safari --app-name 'Out Loud Extension' --bundle-identifier com.lightcloudlabs.outloud.extension --no-prompt
